Deepa Prabakaran                                                                                                                                                                         

Email: nvmnvm1971@gmail.com| Chennai, India |+917904530229 

 

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY SKILLS:  

I am a Flutter developer with hands-on experience in building mobile applications using Flutter, Firebase, and REST APIs. I have worked on projects involving user authentication, real-time data handling, and API integration. I am familiar with local storage solutions like Shared Preferences and Hive, and basic data validation techniques. I enjoy solving problems, fixing bugs, and improving app performance. I am looking for an opportunity to grow my skills and contribute to real-world software development projects. 
 I have experience working with clean UI design and responsive layouts across different screen sizes. I am also continuously learning new technologies and best practices to improve code quality and application performance. 

 

TECHNICAL SKILLS 

  • ●Mobile App Development: Flutter (UI Development, Widgets, Navigation), Dart,MVVM,BLoC,   

  • ●Firebase & Backend: Firebase, Firebase Authentication, 

  • ●API & Networking: REST API Integration, JSON Parsing, HTTP Requests 

  • ●Languages: Dart, Flutter, Firebase (Authentication, Database, Hosting), API, HTML-CSS (basic tags and Styles) 

  • ●Tools Handling: Figma (UI Designs), Post Man (API Testing), Git (project tracking)

    Flutter Developer (Freelance) – Laundry App                                                                                           Apr 2026 – Present 

    Laundry Service Mobile Application (Flutter) - to track the customer orders                                          

  • ●Developed a mobile application using Flutter to manage laundry service orders, allowing users to place orders and track their status in real time. Implemented features such as order creation, status updates, and a clean, responsive user interface. Integrated Firebase / REST APIs for managing and syncing order data efficiently. 

  • ●Integrated Firebase Authentication for secure user registration and login, along with Firebase / REST APIs for managing and syncing order data efficiently. 

  • ●Applied Provider for state management to handle dynamic UI updates and improve application performance. 

  • ●Enabled customers to view service rates and confirm orders based on different categories such as washing, dry cleaning, and ironing, enhancing usability through a structured category-based approach. 

  • ●Implemented time-based tracking (daily, weekly, monthly) for orders and handled edge cases to ensure accurate status updates and reliable data flow.

    Quick Shopping Mobile Application Always present like real project
